title: [session-topology-registry] validate topology ledger schema and fleet bootstrap
description:
Plan source: /Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/PLANS/session-topology-2026-05-01.md
Parent bead: flywheel-se3h
Prior all-in-one implementation bead: flywheel-31p
Slice: topology ledger schema, latest-row resolution, and fleet bootstrap conformance.

## Goal

Make `~/.local/state/flywheel/session-topology.jsonl` a validated append-only topology ledger with latest-wins resolution and a reproducible bootstrap fixture for the sessions named in the plan.

## Scope

- Ledger path: `~/.local/state/flywheel/session-topology.jsonl`.
- Test or probe paths: existing topology tests, `tests/**`, or `.flywheel/scripts/topology-gap-probe.sh`.
- Validate schema fields from the plan: `session`, `orchestrator_pane`, `orchestrator_kind`, `callback_pane`, `worker_panes`, `worker_kinds`, `shell_panes`, `human_pane`, `expected_pane_count`, `effective_at`, `registered_by`, `notes`.
- Validate latest-wins jq semantics for repeated rows.

## Acceptance Gates

1. `test -f ~/.local/state/flywheel/session-topology.jsonl` passes.
2. `jq -s 'group_by(.session) | map(max_by(.effective_at))' ~/.local/state/flywheel/session-topology.jsonl` succeeds.
3. A fixture or test proves repeated rows for the same session resolve to the row with the newest `effective_at`.
4. A probe reports missing required fields per current topology schema instead of silently accepting malformed rows.
5. The fleet bootstrap fixture covers at least the plan's sessions: flywheel, picoz, alpsinsurance, vrtx, zesttube, skillos, clutterfreespaces, zeststream-v2, or records an explicit current-fleet delta reason.
6. Documentation or test output references `flywheel-31p` as prior all-in-one implementation and explains this bead's conformance-hardening role.

## Three-Q Audit

- VALIDATED: schema/latest-wins checks run mechanically.
- DOCUMENTED: ledger fields and bootstrap expectations are described in test or README-facing docs.
- SURFACED: topology gaps are emitted by a probe or doctor-consumable receipt instead of remaining manual knowledge.

## Doctrine Refs

- AGENTS.md L29 NTM-only doctrine.
- AGENTS.md L57 loop-state marker is not a driver.
- AGENTS.md L69 runtime context probing.
- AGENTS.md L71 validate-and-redispatch discipline.
- Memory: feedback_orchestrator_must_finish_p0_before_filing_more.
- Memory: feedback_three_audit_questions_per_surface.

## Dependencies

- Blocked by: flywheel-se3h parent decomposition.
- Blocks: register-session, callback routing, doctor integrity, idle-drift topology, and final rollout proof.

## Out Of Scope

- No live topology row mutation without explicit implementation dispatch.
- No direct pane command inspection outside a validated register/doctor command.

## Rollback / Dry-Run Posture

All checks must support fixture topology files via `FLYWHEEL_SESSION_TOPOLOGY` or equivalent before touching the live ledger.

## DOD

Close with reason: `validated topology ledger schema/latest-wins/bootstrap; tests=<commands>; commit_tag=flywheel-se3h-registry`.

## Callback Evidence Shape

`DONE <bead-id> evidence=<schema/latest-wins receipt> tests=PASS topology_sessions=<N> callback_delivery_verified=true`.
notes: VALIDATOR BLOCK_CLOSE 2026-05-04: open_children=flywheel-se3h.2,flywheel-se3h.9 OPEN; public_lens=FAIL (no_acceptance_gates_addressed, no_bar_self_grade). Cannot close while siblings open.
